risks_and_dependencies_summary.title: Login with valid credentials
risks_and_dependencies_summary.risk: High risk as it is a critical path in most applications; failure can block subsequent test cases and prevent access to the application.

risks_and_dependencies_summary.title: Login with invalid credentials
risks_and_dependencies_summary.risk: Medium risk, potentially impacting security and user experience evaluation. Ensures error handling is as expected.

risks_and_dependencies_summary.title: Password reset
risks_and_dependencies_summary.risk: High risk because incorrect implementation can lead to security vulnerabilities or lock users out of their accounts.

risks_and_dependencies_summary.title: Add new employee
risks_and_dependencies_summary.risk: Medium risk due to potential data integrity issues. It tests critical functionality that impacts data within the system.

risks_and_dependencies_summary.title: View employee details
risks_and_dependencies_summary.risk: Low risk, though important for verifying user permissions and data display. Relies on prior creation of employee records.

prioritized_test_plan.title: Login with valid credentials
prioritized_test_plan.justification: Critical path with high risk; it is necessary for accessing the application and executing subsequent test cases.

prioritized_test_plan.title: Login with invalid credentials
prioritized_test_plan.justification: Medium risk affecting security and user experience; relies on a successful login with valid credentials (TC001).

prioritized_test_plan.title: Password reset
prioritized_test_plan.justification: High risk due to potential security vulnerabilities; depends on successful validation of login with invalid credentials (TC002).

prioritized_test_plan.title: Add new employee
prioritized_test_plan.justification: Medium risk involving data integrity; essential for testing data manipulation and depends on successful login (TC001).

prioritized_test_plan.title: View employee details
prioritized_test_plan.justification: Low priority and risk; final test relies on the successful addition of employee records (TC004) and is essential for verifying data display.
